sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Number of Contracts = Account Equity / (Maximum Loss Per Contract / f-value). The f-value (0 < f < 1) is user-determined divisor representing risk tolerance and drawdown tolerance. Formula implements fractional Kelly principle with author-specified divisor.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing account equity by the quotient of maximum loss per contract divided by the f-value (divisor between 0 and 1)
